parents.subject: LU-12923 libcfs: Remove CLASSERT() for libcfs_private.h

commit.subject: LU-00000 tests: perform full group tests
commit.message:
LU-00000 tests: perform full group tests

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el7.7 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el7.7 \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testgroup=full

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el7.7 serverdistro=el7.7 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el7.7 serverdistro=el7.7 \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testgroup=full

Change-Id: I1dc36b32c283292ee2230f186c7b60d2747ff0f4
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
